description: Get the execution status of a SupportSave request using its request ID

id.description: Request ID returned when a SupportSave operation is initiated

policy.notes: Requires a request ID generated by the SupportSave creation API. Cannot be used with filenames returned by supportsave list.

usage.notes: The request ID is only available from the SupportSave creation response. Completed supportsave files do not expose execution IDs.

name: fabric_get_fabric_overview
description: Tier-2: Compact fabric overview (headline + optional errors/devices summary). Set include_raw=true to include raw Tier-1 payloads (large).

fabric_name.description: Optional: filter to a single fabric by name

include_health.description: If true, enrich output with fabric health data (via Tier-1).

include_errors.description: If true, include fabric errors data when available (via Tier-1).

include_devices.description: If true, include per-fabric devices_summary (counts by role/firmware/config state).

include_raw.description: If true, include raw Tier-1 payloads (summary_raw/health_raw/devices_raw). Output becomes large.

name: fabric_get_fabric_health_summary
description: Tier-2: fabric health summary (global + per-fabric). Combines fabrics-health, fabric-health, service health, and optional errors into an actionable summary with next steps.

name.description: Fabric name. If omitted, runs in global mode.

include_service_health.description: Include fabric service health (fabric_get_health / service health).

include_errors.description: Include errors sections using fabrics-errors and fabric-errors (with fallback).

expand_unhealthy.description: In global mode, expand first unhealthy fabrics into partial summaries.

include_raw.description: Include raw Tier-1 per-fabric health payload as health_raw.
